text:
Created attachment 245818
bmd-2.2.patch

I updated bmd to 2.2 for bug fixes and the introduction of a new feature.
The attached 'bmd-2.2.patch' upgrades systuils/bmd port. Please apply to the Ports tree.

The release note is shown in the following URL.

https://github.com/yuichiro-naito/bmd/releases/tag/2.2
